mapper.sql: id, role_name, role_code, role_desc, data_scope, status, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT r.id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.role_desc, r.data_scope, r.status, r.sort_order, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.is_deleted FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role ( role_name, role_code, role_desc, data_scope, status, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{roleName}, #{roleCode}, #{roleDesc}, #{dataScope}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
